title: ContextDNA Panel Manifest
description: Canonical JSON Schema (draft-07) for panel.manifest.json at schema_version 1.0.0. additionalProperties is false at the root so unknown keys force an explicit schema_version bump. See migrate2/docs/panels/manifest-spec.md for prose.

schema_version.description: Version of the manifest schema itself (NOT the panel's own version). Strict semver. The substrate routes through migrations from older versions per spec section 10.

id.description: Unique panel identifier. Reverse-DNS or kebab-case. Used as install directory name and namespace prefix for panel-scoped events.

name.description: Human-readable label rendered in the DockView tab.

version.description: The panel's own semver. Distinct from schema_version (which versions the manifest contract).

mothership_min_version.description: Minimum mothership runtime semver this panel was tested against. Substrate refuses to mount if running mothership is older.

author.description: Author block. `name` is the only mandatory subfield.

description.description: One-line elevator pitch, surfaced in `context-dna-ide panel list`.

domains.description: Dotted domain tags. Drives domain-aware injection. Wildcard values (`*`, `all`) are rejected.

language_affinity.description: Programming languages this panel cares about. Used as tiebreaker.

evidence_emits.description: All event types the panel may emit. Substrate rejects any undeclared emit.

evidence_subscribes.description: All event types the panel wants delivered.

mount.description: How the substrate instantiates the UI. See spec section 4.

requires_env.description: Map of env var name to {required, description, secret}. Substrate prompts user for missing required vars.

requires_mcp_servers.description: MCP server names that must be running for this panel.

requires_credentials.description: Keychain or vault entries the panel needs.

network.description: Hostnames only — no bare `*`, no full URLs. `*.example.com` is allowed (single-level wildcard).

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Surfaced on install.
